steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Calculations for ISA Energia Brasil - Dec 2024
from decimal import Decimal
# Raw inputs
assets = 43304632000.0
cash = 2914747000.0
fin_app = 485995000.0
avail = cash + fin_app
current_assets = 7939449000.0
# debts
short_debt = 1203990000.0
long_debt = 12069814000.0
gross_debt = short_debt + long_debt
equity = 20071282000.0
# income statement
rev_12 = 7966581000.0
rev_9 = 5446511000.0
ebit_12 = 5131278000.0
ebit_9 = 4002768000.0
net_12 = 3552731000.0
net_9 = 2327762000.0
# quarter (3m) as difference
rev_q = rev_12 - rev_9
ebit_q = ebit_12 - ebit_9
net_q = net_12 - net_9
# shares
shares = 658883304
price = 31.91
market_cap = price * shares
# EBITDA (add depreciation)
dep = 37357000.0
ebitda = ebit_12 + abs(dep)
# capital de giro
current_liabilities = 3264818000.0
working_capital = current_assets - current_liabilities
# Fornecedores
suppliers = 182169000.0
# Ratios
lpa = (3498416000.0) / shares  # lucro atribuído a sócios controladores
vpa = equity / shares
pl = price / lpa if lpa!=0 else None
pvp = price / vpa if vpa!=0 else None
p_ebit = market_cap / ebit_12 if ebit_12!=0 else None
psr = market_cap / rev_12 if rev_12!=0 else None
p_assets = market_cap / assets
p_cap_giro = market_cap / working_capital if working_capital!=0 else None
p_ativ_circ_liq = p_cap_giro
ev = market_cap + (gross_debt - avail)  # market cap + net debt
ev_ebitda = ev / ebitda if ebitda!=0 else None
ev_ebit = ev / ebit_12 if ebit_12!=0 else None
lpa_val = lpa
vpa_val = vpa
# margins (as %)
mar_br = (3737461000.0 / rev_12) * 100 if rev_12!=0 else None
mar_ebit = (ebit_12 / rev_12) * 100 if rev_12!=0 else None
mar_liq = (net_12 / rev_12) * 100 if rev_12!=0 else None
ebit_asset = (ebit_12 / assets) * 100
# ROIC = EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
roic = (ebit_12 / (assets - suppliers - cash)) * 100
roe = (net_12 / equity) * 100
liquidez_corr = current_assets / current_liabilities
divbr_patrim = gross_debt / equity
giro_ativos = rev_12 / assets
# Roundings and formatting
def fmt(n):
    if n is None:
        return 'N/A'
    if isinstance(n, float):
        return float(Decimal(n).quantize(Decimal('0.01')))
    return n

out = {
    'Ativo': fmt(assets),
    'Disponibilidades': fmt(avail),
    'Ativo Circulante': fmt(current_assets),
    'Dív. Bruta': fmt(gross_debt),
    'Dív. Líquida': fmt(gross_debt - avail),
    'Patrim. Lq': fmt(equity),
    'Receita La (12 meses)': fmt(rev_12),
    'EBIT (12 meses)': fmt(ebit_12),
    'Lucro Lo (12 meses)': fmt(net_12),
    'Receita La (3 meses)': fmt(rev_q),
    'EBIT (3 meses)': fmt(ebit_q),
    'Lucro Lo (3 meses)': fmt(net_q),
    'P/L': fmt(pl),
    'P/VP': fmt(pvp),
    'P/EBIT': fmt(p_ebit),
    'PSR': fmt(psr),
    'P/Ativos': fmt(p_assets),
    'P/Cap. Giro': fmt(p_cap_giro),
    'P/Ativ Circ Liq': fmt(p_ativ_circ_liq),
    'EV / EBITDA': fmt(ev_ebitda),
    'EV / EBIT': fmt(ev_ebit),
    'LPA': fmt(lpa_val),
    'VPA': fmt(vpa_val),
    'Marg. Bruta (%)': f"{mar_br:.2f} %",
    'Marg. EBIT (%)': f"{mar_ebit:.2f} %",
    'Marg. La (%)': f"{mar_liq:.2f} %",
    'EBIT / Ativo (%)': f"{ebit_asset:.2f} %",
    'ROIC (%)': f"{roic:.2f} %",
    'ROE (%)': f"{roe:.2f} %",
    'Liquidez Corr': fmt(liquidez_corr),
    'Div Br/ Patrim': fmt(divbr_patrim),
    'Giro Ativos': fmt(giro_ativos),
    'Market Cap': fmt(market_cap),
    'EV': fmt(ev),
    'EBITDA': fmt(ebitda),
    'Shares': shares,
    'Price': price
}
out
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter

steps.arguments: {"inp":{"code":"# Print the out dictionary\nimport json\nprint(json.dumps({k:v for k,v in out.items()}, indent=2))"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter

    'P/L': round(pl,2) if pl else 'N/A',
    'P/VP': round(pvp,2) if pvp else 'N/A',
